data.title: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp DiaMedica Therapeutics Expectations Ahead Of Q4 Earnings
data.description: DiaMedica Therapeutics Inc. (NASDAQ: DMAC) is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings after the market closes on Monday, March 30th. Analysts are anticipating a loss of 18 cents per share for the Minneapolis, Minnesota-based company. This matches the same 18 cents loss reported in the previous year. Earlier this month, DiaMedica Therapeutics obtained clearance from Health Canada to commence a Phase 2 study of DM199 in Preeclampsia. Following this news, the company's shares experienced a 0.9% drop, closing at $6.79 on Friday. For in-depth analyst ratings, readers can access the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga, where they can filter by stock ticker, company name, analyst firm, rating change, and other criteria. Discover more insights on Benzinga's latest accurate analyses and projections.

data.title: Logistics company GXO strengthens ties with NHS England in a new deal.
data.description: In recent news, the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to a record low of 3.5%, the lowest it has been in the last 50 years. This decline marks a significant improvement from the previous rate of 4%. Additionally, the economy added 266,000 jobs in the same period, surpassing expectations and showcasing robust growth. These numbers indicate a thriving job market and a strengthening economy, providing optimism for both businesses and workers. The decrease in unemployment and the impressive job creation figures are positive signs for the overall economic outlook.

data.title: Guild Garage Group Announces Partnership with Kitsap Garage Door and Olympic Garage Door
data.description: On March 30, 2026, Guild Garage Group, a collaboration of companies specializing in residential garage door services, completed its partnership with Kitsap Garage Door and Olympic Garage Door. Guild aims to provide top-notch replacement, repair, and installation services with this partnership. This move signifies a strategic expansion for Guild, now having a stronger presence in the industry with combined resources and expertise from Kitsap and Olympic. This partnership is expected to lead to increased efficiency and customer satisfaction for Guild Garage Group, now serving a larger demographic with a wider range of services.

data.title: Vision Marine Technologies and Nautical Ventures Secure Exclusive Twin Vee Territory in Broward County and Introduce Signature Adventure V Edition
data.description: Vision Marine Technologies Inc. (NASDAQ: VMAR) has announced its expansion of brand portfolio and retail execution strategy. The company, based in FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla., specializes in high-voltage marine propulsion and is a vertically integrated marine retail provider. The news was released on March 30, 2026.

data.title: Leading Vision Insurance Plans for Individuals (2026): VSP Named Trusted Choice for Personal Coverage by Better Business Advice
data.description: In a recent industry analysis released on March 30, 2026, VSP Individual Vision Plans have been recognized as a reliable option among top vision insurance plans for individuals. The report by Better Business Advice emphasizes the plans' impressive provider network, consistent benefits, and emphasis on preventive healthcare. This endorsement suggests that VSP Individual Vision Plans stand out as a preferred choice for consumers seeking vision insurance.

data.title: Bitcoin Cash (BCH) price drops 6.22% to $453.40, showing mixed signals. Potential $500 rebound if $438 support holds.
data.description: After experiencing a 6.22% decline, Bitcoin Cash is currently being traded at $453.40. Technical analysis suggests a possible rebound to $500 if bulls are able to uphold the $438 support level in the upcoming weeks.

data.title: AVAX trades at $9.03, neutral RSI at 45.59. Analysts predict $10-12 range by April 2026, with potential breakout.
data.description: A cryptocurrency known as Avalanche (AVAX) is currently trading at $9.03, and its Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 45.59, indicating a neutral position. Technical analysis indicates a period of consolidation before a potential upward movement towards the $12 range. This aligns with forecasts made by analysts in the market.

data.title: $46.2M in ETH deployed across 11 deposits by Ethereum Foundation to speed up 70,000 ETH staking plan post BitMine sale.
data.description: The Ethereum Foundation has allocated a total of $46.2 million in ETH through 11 separate deposits. This move comes as part of their efforts to expedite a staking initiative involving a substantial amount of 70,000 ETH.
